Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Award And Stay Litigation
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF WOOD PARK CARE, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration Award And Stay Litigation is continued to December 20, 2013 at 9:30 am per the Amended Notice filed on October 24, 2013. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
